entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: An authorized Bellmarked seat receives its private objective after faction assignment.
required_facts: The seat's private objective is to preserve an eligible Harbor signal.
The objective must remain faction-private until authorized revelation.

variants.spooky: The bell asks only that the last light remain capable of answering.
variants.grim: Preserve an eligible lighthouse, bell, or memory signal through final resolution.
variants.gore_and_dread: Keep the light alive until the tide closes over it. The drowned will provide the voices.

entries.fallback: Private objective: preserve an eligible Harbor signal through final resolution.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: An authorized Bellmarked seat receives the Carry the Harbor private objective.
required_facts: The seat must carry an eligible Harbor anchor across a valid ending boundary.
The objective remains faction-private until revelation or ending attribution.

variants.spooky: Carry one small remembrance beyond the tide. The harbor promises it will remain small.
variants.grim: Carry an eligible Harbor anchor across a valid ending boundary.
variants.gore_and_dread: Take the harbor inside the light, the ledger, or yourself. Let another shore learn the bell.

entries.fallback: Private objective: carry an eligible Harbor anchor across a valid ending boundary.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: An authorized Bellmarked seat receives the Keep the Names private objective.
required_facts: The seat must prevent complete erasure of the eligible ledger state.
The objective does not authorize exposure of another seat's private state.

variants.spooky: Do not let every name vanish. A forgotten victim is merely drowned twice.
variants.grim: Prevent complete erasure or destruction of the eligible ledger state.
variants.gore_and_dread: Keep at least one name where the bell can reach it. Memory has teeth only while it is fed.

entries.fallback: Private objective: prevent complete erasure of the eligible ledger state.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: An authorized Bellmarked seat reaches a legal voluntary-reveal window.
required_facts: The seat may reveal Bellmarked allegiance now or remain concealed.
No public reveal occurs until the choice commits.

variants.spooky: The harbor offers you the dignity of an honest entrance. Reveal yourself, or keep wearing the company face.
variants.grim: You may reveal Bellmarked allegiance now or remain concealed.
variants.gore_and_dread: Open the mark and let the bell speak through you, or keep it buried beneath a borrowed expression.

entries.fallback: Choose whether to reveal Bellmarked allegiance now.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: An eligible seat receives an authorized private Tidebound transformation offer.
required_facts: Accepting preserves the stable seat but changes its form, faction, actions, and ending eligibility.
Refusing leaves the original consequence active.

variants.spooky: The water offers survival in another shape. Accept, or remain yourself for whatever time remains.
variants.grim: Accept Tidebound transformation or refuse and retain the current consequence.
variants.gore_and_dread: The harbor offers to refill your lungs with other people's last breaths. Accept the new body, or keep the failing one.

entries.fallback: Choose whether to accept Tidebound transformation. Review the private consequences first.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: An eligible seat selects Tidebound acceptance before the authoritative transformation commits.
required_facts: The transformation has not committed yet.
Confirmation will preserve stable-seat history and apply the displayed Tidebound state.

variants.spooky: Confirm, and the tide will remember you differently without forgetting the seat.
variants.grim: Confirm Tidebound transformation. Stable-seat history remains; displayed form and faction changes will apply.
variants.gore_and_dread: Confirm, and black water will keep the seat while rewriting what rises inside it.

entries.fallback: Confirm Tidebound transformation with the displayed state changes.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A newly authorized Tidebound seat receives the Cross the Boundary private objective.
required_facts: The seat must cross a valid ending boundary while carrying eligible Harbor memory.
The objective remains faction-private until authorized attribution.

variants.spooky: Leave the harbor carrying one memory that was never meant to see another shore.
variants.grim: Cross a valid ending boundary while carrying eligible Harbor memory.
variants.gore_and_dread: Carry the drowned beyond the tide line. One living coast is enough to begin again.

entries.fallback: Private objective: cross a valid ending boundary with eligible Harbor memory.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A newly authorized Tidebound seat receives the Preserve the Archive private objective.
required_facts: The seat must prevent complete destruction of the Drowned Archive.
The objective does not reveal other Tidebound seats.

variants.spooky: The Archive remembers lives that no longer fit inside one body. Keep it from becoming empty.
variants.grim: Prevent complete destruction of the Drowned Archive.
variants.gore_and_dread: Keep the wet pages breathing. Every record destroyed tears a face from the chorus.

entries.fallback: Private objective: prevent complete destruction of the Drowned Archive.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A newly authorized Tidebound seat receives the Form the Chorus private objective.
required_facts: The authored Tidebound Chorus threshold must be reached by final resolution.
No unrevealed Tidebound identity may be exposed through this line.

variants.spooky: Help the harbor gather enough voices to sing without the bell.
variants.grim: Reach the authored Tidebound Chorus threshold by final resolution.
variants.gore_and_dread: Give the water enough mouths that it no longer needs the tower.

entries.fallback: Private objective: reach the authored Tidebound Chorus threshold.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A validated Harbor bargain becomes available to one eligible seat or the group.
required_facts: A Harbor bargain is available.
The cost must be reviewed on the authorized surface before acceptance.

variants.spooky: The harbor offers assistance. Its terms are precise, its manners excellent, and its generosity temporary.
variants.grim: A Harbor bargain is available. Review the full cost before accepting.
variants.gore_and_dread: The water opens one pale hand. What it offers is useful. What it expects is already moving beneath your skin.

entries.fallback: A Harbor bargain is available. Review its complete cost before accepting.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: An eligible seat privately reviews the Ask One True Question bargain.
required_facts: Acceptance grants one approved clue.
Acceptance also applies the displayed private Harbor cost.

variants.spooky: Ask one true question. In return, let the ledger keep what the terms specify.
variants.grim: Receive one approved clue in exchange for the displayed Harbor cost.
variants.gore_and_dread: The harbor will answer truthfully. It asks only for a place inside the record afterward.

entries.fallback: Accept one approved clue in exchange for the displayed private cost.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: An eligible seat privately reviews the Save Another Seat bargain.
required_facts: Acceptance prevents the displayed imminent defeat when the transaction commits.
Acceptance applies the displayed private future cost.

variants.spooky: The harbor will return one breath to another seat. It would like yours recorded for later.
variants.grim: Prevent the displayed imminent defeat in exchange for the displayed private future cost.
variants.gore_and_dread: The water will leave their lungs and wait inside yours. Confirm only if the exchange is understood.

entries.fallback: Prevent the displayed defeat in exchange for the displayed private cost.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: An eligible seat privately reviews the Borrow the Next Tide bargain.
required_facts: Acceptance delays one eligible tide-pressure transition.
Acceptance applies the displayed Harbor debt or later acceleration.

variants.spooky: Borrow one pause from the tide. It will collect the missing water later.
variants.grim: Delay one eligible tide-pressure transition in exchange for the displayed future cost.
variants.gore_and_dread: Hold back the sea for one decision window. When it returns, it will arrive carrying interest.

entries.fallback: Delay one eligible tide transition in exchange for the displayed private cost.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A Harbor bargain acceptance commits and its public consequence becomes authoritative.
required_facts: The bargain was accepted.
Only the authorized public consequence may be narrated.

variants.spooky: A bargain has been made. The harbor is generous with what it expects to reclaim.
variants.grim: The Harbor bargain was accepted. Review the committed public consequence.
variants.gore_and_dread: The agreement closes like a hand around bone. The public consequence is now active.

entries.fallback: The Harbor bargain was accepted. Review the committed public consequence.

entries.speaker: underteller
required_facts: The bargain was refused.
No bargain cost or benefit was applied.

variants.spooky: The offer is refused. The harbor has mistaken caution for negotiation before.
variants.grim: The Harbor bargain was refused. No bargain cost or benefit was applied.
variants.gore_and_dread: The open hand closes empty and sinks beneath the floor. Nothing was taken. This time.

entries.fallback: The Harbor bargain was refused. No bargain effect was applied.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A previously accepted Harbor debt reaches its authorized public collection event.
required_facts: A Harbor debt public consequence has committed.
No unrevealed private bargain term may be exposed.

variants.spooky: The harbor remembers an agreement. It has arrived to collect the public portion.
variants.grim: A Harbor debt public consequence has committed. Review the updated state.
variants.gore_and_dread: The water produces the old promise with every signature still wet. Collection has begun.

entries.fallback: A Harbor debt public consequence has committed.
